reviews.text: David has been nothing but knowledgeable to me, and very professional. I originally found his store a few years ago, wandered in because it is truly one of a kind, and I have been coming back since. This past September, I came in to learn more about digital camera's. After spending many days coming in to visit with David, emailing back and forth on a respectable timeline, and many hours of doing my own research I settled on a Canon R6 Mark II. I can not begin to thank David enough for all the time he spent working with me, and how patient and sensible he was in every conversation we had. This past week, I came back in wanting to expand my collection to offer film, and yet again he was so knowledgable to my decision. He ended up setting me up with a fully restored, crisp condition Canon AE-1, a vintage camera strap, and set me up with several rolls of film. For  anyone who happens to have a bad encounter with David, I truly believe you are just too immature and too sensitive. As his humor is an acquired taste, so is his knowledge of everything in the photography world. His experience of 40 years is an understatement in my opinion, as his wisdom with cameras is absolutely amazing. I will continue to come back and visit, whether I need new gear or not. 5/5 stars always!
Phenomenal shop! We're lucky to have such a place in the county. The owner David is full of knowledge and helpful advice. He even had a very obscure filter size in stock for my old FL lens!

David was incredibly knowledgeable in helping my daughter choose the right film camera — both for hobby photography and potential professional use. He took the time to walk her through everything, was direct and patient with all of her questions, and did it all while juggling multiple other customers. He clearly knows his stuff and gets straight to the point without any fluff.

If you need anything camera-related purchased or questions answered, David is your person. Highly recommend!

Man where to begin. I visited Breckenridge photographics for the first time this week and David provided more then just customer service, He provided a whole experience. This was my second time in breck and I happened to walk by his shop, and boy am I glad I did. The first time I walked in just to buy some film, and he left such an impression on me I had to come back the next day just to hear his story. David was kind enough to give me 3 hours of his time, going into detail on photographs he has taken, expeditions and projects he’s worked on over the years, and so much more wisdom about photography. He and his lovely wife Emily were so kind and provided so much encouraged for me to go further in my photography career. If your in breckinridge, doesn’t matter if you take photos or not, go in and check out his work. I promise you’ll leave feeling inspired to start taking photos!

David has a breadth of knowledge and experience from what I think is becoming a lost art. If he offered classes I would drive hours just to attend. I have been in many photography shops but this one has been the best one by far. He helped me add to my lenses as well as with the no BS policy gave amazing advice. Thank you David!
